Watch what sugar does to our belly.

Between Ozempic and Wegovy, which one do you think is the best?

Neither.

I have some information about weight loss drugs that might be news to you.

Off-label prescriptions for Ozempic. Tell me your thoughts.

I certainly see it being used off-label for a large number of my patients.

It's now the weight loss drug of the stars, and I'm concerned about that.

What I think people are unaware of is nearly 50% of all their weight loss is in muscle mass and not fat mass.

So yes, they lose pounds, but about half of the pounds they lose are muscles.

When they stop Ozempic, their weight rebounds rapidly.

A lot of people are surprised that most of our weight loss or gain is actually controlled by the bugs that live in our gut.

And we now know from both animal studies and human studies that there are lean bacteria and there are obesogenic bacteria.

One of the tricks is to give lean bacteria what they want to eat.

Think of this pig intestine as your gut.

The lining inside your gut is very thin and just one cell thin.

But many of the foods we're told are healthy are actually creating tiny tears in the lining of our guts.

Avocados are really one of the best foods that you can eat.

They're almost pure fat and fiber, and it's fiber that your gut buddies love.

Tomatoes. Now, remember, tomatoes are not a vegetable. They are a fruit.

And the scary thing about tomatoes is that the peel and the seeds have lectins, in fact, fairly nasty lectins.

So if you have issues with joint pain, arthritis, this is not your friend.

People know that there's something wrong.

They're eating healthier than ever, and yet they're sicker than ever.

And do you think it's stoppable through diet?

Yes.

Really?

Yes.

What would you say if this guy told you to go on a diet?

This was me at 42.

I was a highly successful doctor.

I performed thousands of life-saving heart surgeries, and I was 70 pounds overweight, giving people health advice.

And I'm sure some of my patients were thinking, who are you to talk?

But here's the worst part.

I was exercising daily, watching my calories, eating salads by the truckload.

In other words, I was the living embodiment of everything most experts would call a healthy lifestyle.

None of it was working.

I was still tired. I was still heavy. I was almost ready to give up on getting my health back.

Maybe you've been there, too.

But then I tried something completely different.

I threw out a lot of what I'd been taught about being healthy and focused instead on a new scientific breakthrough.

Now, when I share the secret that helped me go from looking like this in my 40s to looking like this in my 70s, people don't say, who are you to talk?

They say things like this.

The greatest thing is that I never feel bloated anymore.

I feel better. I've lost weight for sure.

My whole digestive system seems to just be working so much better.

It's exactly what you said it would be.

The way that I feel. It's a game changer.

I just want to thank Dr. Gundry. He saved my life.

If you're over 35, you've probably been feeling changes of how your body processes food.

Maybe you're going to the bathroom more often or with less warning or having a hard time getting everything out in a way that's comfortable.

Suddenly, there's extra pounds piling up on your waist and thighs or your energy levels crash and your joints and muscles feel stiffer.

Most of us have been taught to believe this is all just a part of getting older, but it's not.

Believe me, I was taught the same thing.

And while I'm grateful for a first-class education I received at Yale and the Medical College of Georgia, once I got out into the real world working with patients that other doctors had given up on, I realized a lot of the medical establishment's best practices weren't working for me or my patients.

So I walked away from my position as chief of heart surgery to start my own practice focused on things that other doctors were ignoring.

That's where I discovered the secret that helped me transform my own health.

And by sharing the secret, I've now helped thousands of people just like you to get their energy and mobility back, to take control of their digestion, and to finally feel like their body is working the way it's supposed to.

The key is combining three specific things that work together to support your gut, the part of your body where good health starts.

The first one you've been hearing about since you were a kid and your grandmother told you to drink prune juice.

Fiber.

Fiber helps push out toxins and waste.

It supports healthy blood sugar levels and can even reduce junk food cravings by making you feel more satisfied.

And everyone has heard they need to get fiber.

There's just one problem.

Even though we're trying, we're eating more salads, we're choosing whole wheat bread, and drinking fiber shakes between meals, science tells us 95% of Americans still aren't getting enough fiber.

How can that be?

Well, my research confirms that all fiber is not created equal.

There's soluble fiber, insoluble fiber, prebiotic fiber, and more.

And they all affect your body in different ways.

Now, I typically recommend prebiotic fiber because prebiotic fiber isn't just good for you. It's good for the helper bacteria that live in your gut.

When you give them their favorite kind of prebiotic fiber, those good gut bugs will thank you by working to help you overcome gas, bloating, and occasional diarrhea or constipation.

I'll show you one fiber source they absolutely love in a minute.

But to really get the most out of it, you need to know gut health secret number two.

Probiotics, also known as good gut bacteria.

I'm sure you've heard of those.

But what most people don't realize is there are just so many.

The latest count from Harvard University is over 500 different strains of probiotic bacteria.

Some can support weight loss. Others can help your digestion stay smooth and regular.

There are strains that can help you think more clearly or reduce joint discomfort.

But frankly, a lot of the strains don't do much at all for the way you look or feel.

This is the reason so many people are disappointed by the probiotics they get at the store.

When you buy probiotics, you need to find a blend that's designed to help you achieve what you want to achieve.

For most of us, that's better digestion, more energy, an active body that feels slim, comfortable, and strong.

That's certainly what I wanted.

And it took me years of searching to find the right strains to help me get there.

In the end, I found two specific strains that made all the difference.

But what turned them from healthful bacteria into true health game changers was combining them with gut secret number three.

Postbiotics, powerful compounds that are created naturally when the probiotics in your gut are thriving.

When you add all three of these things to your diet, you will be absolutely shocked at the difference it makes to the way you feel and even to the way you look.

Have you ever seen someone that just has a natural healthy glow?

The secret isn't youth or money or genetics.

That is what good digestion looks like.

Here's how it works.

You start with that nourishing prebiotic fiber, the natural fuel your gut buddies love.

Then those probiotic bacteria work like busy little factories to turn it into postbiotics.

And this stuff is the pot of gold at the end of the rainbow.

Because your body uses these powerful postbiotic compounds to produce the vital energy and smooth digestion that a healthy adult should be enjoying at any age.

Pre, pro, post.

These are the three steps to a complete digestive makeover.

Number two, the probiotics.

You want to use these two strains. I'll put them on screen for you.

B. coagulans and B. bifidum.
